# Willi Wolff — Software Engineer & Technical Architect

> Single-page portfolio and CV for Willi Wolff, a software engineer with 10+ years of experience across blockchain infrastructure, distributed systems, mobile, and IoT. Currently technical architect for a Byzantine-resistant publish/subscribe network at Input Output Global (IOG).

## About

Personal portfolio and CV. Experience spans enterprise (Deloitte), blockchain infrastructure (Bitcoin/Cardano), IoT, and mobile. Founder DNA, with deep expertise in distributed systems, secure application development, and event-driven architecture. Works end-to-end: ship a working version early to surface risks fast, then iterate. At his best in small teams on hard problems, stepping beyond the pure engineering role when a project calls for it.

## Site structure

The site is a single scrolling page with these sections (anchor links):

- `/#profile` — short professional summary
- `/#technologies` — technology stack
- `/#experience` — full work history
- `/#publications` — published work
- `/#projects` — selected projects
- `/#education` — education

## Experience highlights

- **Technical Architect — Byzantine-Resistant PubSub Network**, IOG (Feb 2026–present): leading a team of 5, formally verifying a research proposal and building a prototype; evaluating peer-sampling protocols for specific security properties.
- **Technical Architect — Ouroboros Leios**, IOG (Nov 2024–Feb 2026): led R&D for Cardano's high-throughput overlay protocol; principal author of CIP-0164.
- **Technical Architect — Lace Wallet**, IOG (Nov 2022–Nov 2024): event-driven re-architecture (45% latency reduction, 60%+ cost savings), custom chain indexer (2,000+ tx/s), MetaDex swap feature.
- **Solutions Architect**, IOG (Nov 2021–Nov 2022): Plutus smart-contract architecture; workshops for 100+ Amazon engineers.
- **Senior Software Engineer**, Mobility Data Lab (Feb 2020–Nov 2021): IoT and connected-vehicle systems.
- **Software Engineer → Lead Engineer**, Deloitte (Sep 2016–Nov 2019): 16M-line legacy migration toolchain; €6M/yr license savings.
- **Co-Founder & CTO**, CityXcape (Feb 2015–Sep 2016): social discovery platform; raised ~€150k seed.

## Publications

- **CIP-0164: Ouroboros Leios** — principal author. Canonical architecture and design specification for Cardano's high-throughput protocol. https://github.com/cardano-scaling/CIPs/blob/leios/CIP-0164/README.md

## Technologies

TypeScript, Rust, Swift, Kotlin, Python, Java, Haskell. Focus areas: Cardano / eUTxO, Plutus smart contracts, distributed systems, event-driven architecture, cryptography, secure application development.

## Links

- Portfolio & CV: https://wwolff.pages.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/will-break-it
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/wwolff

## Languages

Content available in English (default) and German.

## Contact

Available on request through the website.
